category_sources: Official WavPack homepage describes WavPack as an open audio compression format with lossless, lossy, and hybrid modes.
source_facts.description says WavPack provides hybrid lossless audio compression.
display_name_sources: Official WavPack homepage uses the WavPack name and logo.
source_facts.homepage points to the official WavPack site.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links back to WavPack documentation.
Official WavPack site links a Manual page for user documentation.
Official WavPack site provides WavPack library documentation as a PDF.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README says the dbry/WavPack repository contains the source code for the WavPack library and command-line programs.
tags_sources: Official WavPack homepage describes audio compression, codec features, and command-line interface.
source_facts.description identifies hybrid lossless audio compression.
